result.title: 维修厂发布询价并下单
result.error_message: [SKI313] 关键字 'evaluate' 重试 1 次后仍失败: [SKI302] JavaScript 执行失败: Page.evaluate: Error: 未找到小泽供应商1 - 店铺1 at click (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:1:328) at eval (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:1:1125) at async <anonymous>:260:30 keyword: evaluate
